SEARCH
Package com.example.breeze_seas

Class StatusList

java.lang.Object
com.example.breeze_seas.StatusList
Direct Known Subclasses:
AcceptedList, DeclinedList, PendingList, WaitingList
public abstract class StatusList extends Object
A super class for participant lists. Creates an ArrayList of users registering for events and manages their status in Firestore.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static interface 
    StatusList.ListUpdateListener
    Interface to communicate result of asynchronous database tasks back to the UI.

  • Constructor Details

    • StatusList

      public StatusList(Event event, int capacity)
      Constructor for StatusList.
      Parameters:
      event - The Event object associated with this list.
      capacity - The maximum number of users allowed in this specific list.

  • Method Details

    • getStatusName

      protected abstract String getStatusName()
      Returns the status string used for database queries.
      Returns:
      String representing the status (e.g., "waiting", "selected").

    • addUser

      public void addUser(User user, StatusList.ListUpdateListener listener)
      Adds a user to the event's participant sub-collection in Firestore. Uses merge to preserve existing fields (like location) while updating status.
      Parameters:
      user - The User object to be added.
      listener - Callback to handle success or failure of the DB operation.

    • removeUserFromDB

      public void removeUserFromDB(User user, StatusList.ListUpdateListener listener)
      Removes a user from the event's participant sub-collection in Firestore.
      Parameters:
      user - The User object to be added.
      listener - Callback to handle success or failure of the DB operation.

    • refresh

      public void refresh(StatusList.ListUpdateListener listener)
      Fetches new updates (new addition/deletions) from the event's participant sub-collection in Firestore to update the local list object.
      Parameters:
      listener - Callback to handle success or failure of the DB operation.

      public Event getEvent()
